query:
INSERT INTO players (userId, deviceId, name, email, type, isPremium, totalPuzzles, totalCorrect, totalTimeMs, completedCycles, accuracy, lastActivityAt)
SELECT 
  ch.userId,
  ch.deviceId,
  COALESCE(u.name, CONCAT('Guest_', COALESCE(ch.deviceId, 'unknown'))),
  u.email,
  CASE WHEN ch.userId IS NOT NULL THEN 'registered' ELSE 'anonymous' END,
  0,
  SUM(ch.totalPuzzles),
  SUM(ch.correctCount),
  COALESCE(SUM(ch.totalTimeMs), 0),
  COUNT(*),
  CASE WHEN SUM(ch.totalPuzzles) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((SUM(ch.correctCount) / SUM(ch.totalPuzzles)) * 100, 2) END,
  MAX(ch.completedAt)
FROM cycle_history ch
LEFT JOIN users u ON ch.userId = u.id
WHERE ch.userId IS NOT NULL OR ch.deviceId IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY ch.userId, ch.deviceId;
